description: Style Note Wear this kurta to work or for traditional family functions. With variety and style on their side, span kurtas fulfil the ethnic requirements of your wardrobe. Colourful with a contemporary edge, you can wear these kurtas with contrasting leggings or churidars and ethnic sandals for an easy traditional look.Product Details Green kurta with a mandarin collar with a V-neck, three quarter sleeves with panelling and embroidery at the cuffs, mustard brown panels at the shoulders in front with stitched detailing, black panel around the neckline, pink printed panels on either side in the front and back and embroidery above the hemline and side slitsMaterial and Care 100% cotton Dry clean onlySize and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
